name: Frosted Peanut Butter Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, cream together the margarine and peanut butter with sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Beat in the eggs one at a time. Stir in the vanilla.
3. Combine the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt. Gradually blend into the creamed mixture.
4. Drop dough by rounded teaspoonfuls onto greased cookie sheets.
5. Bake at 375°F for 10 minutes. Cool.
6. Spread with the frosting.
Makes 3 dozen cookies.
Frosting:
1. Melt margarine. Turn off heat and remove from heat.
2. Beat in sugar and vanilla until well combined.
3. Mix in peanut butter. If the mixture becomes too thick, add milk or water to give it a spreading consistency.
